name: BB:BehaviorDefinition: Communication with a Potential Hostile Host (Flows Reference Sets)
notes:
This Building Block defines communication with a potential hostile host, categorized by reference sets.

Note: The reference sets starting with "XFE ATPF" prefixes are automatically managed by the Threat Intelligence App. This requires a paid subscription.

The other reference sets provided by the Threat Intelligence App can be used to include third party Threat Intelligence feeds. Tune these Reference Sets with the adapted Time to Live for each element.

See the blog https://ibm.biz/BdPEXv for details.
bb_references: BB:BehaviorDefinition: Communication with a Potential Hostile Host (Flows Reference Sets) on flows which are detected by the LOCAL system
conditions_text: when the flow context is Local to Local
when the flow matches HTTP Host is not N/A

when the flow matches REFERENCESETCONTAINS('Malicious URLs',"HTTP Host") OR REFERENCESETCONTAINS('Malware URLs',"HTTP Host") OR REFERENCESETCONTAINS('Phishing URLs',"HTTP Host") OR REFERENCESETCONTAINS('XFE ATPF-cryptomining_url',"HTTP Host") OR REFERENCESETCONTAINS('XFE ATPF-mw_url',"HTTP Host") OR REFERENCESETCONTAINS('XFE ATPF-phishing_url',"HTTP Host") OR REFERENCESETCONTAINS('XFE ATPF-c2server_url',"HTTP Host") OR REFERENCESETCONTAINS('XFE ATPF-ew_url',"HTTP Host") OR REFERENCESETCONTAINS('XFE ATPF-anonsvcs_url',"HTTP Host") AQL filter query
TD_list: APPLY BB:BehaviorDefinition: Communication with a Potential Hostile Host (Flows Reference Sets) on flows which are detected by the LOCAL system
AND NOT when the flow context is Local to Local
AND when the flow matches HTTP Host is not N/A

AND when the flow matches REFERENCESETCONTAINS('Malicious URLs',"HTTP Host") OR REFERENCESETCONTAINS('Malware URLs',"HTTP Host") OR REFERENCESETCONTAINS('Phishing URLs',"HTTP Host") OR REFERENCESETCONTAINS('XFE ATPF-cryptomining_url',"HTTP Host") OR REFERENCESETCONTAINS('XFE ATPF-mw_url',"HTTP Host") OR REFERENCESETCONTAINS('XFE ATPF-phishing_url',"HTTP Host") OR REFERENCESETCONTAINS('XFE ATPF-c2server_url',"HTTP Host") OR REFERENCESETCONTAINS('XFE ATPF-ew_url',"HTTP Host") OR REFERENCESETCONTAINS('XFE ATPF-anonsvcs_url',"HTTP Host") AQL filter query
